findings.title: Non-empty hook-data proof can be self-certified without machine-verifiable evidence
findings.suggested_fix: Require structured evidence for swapHookDataPolicy="non-empty-approved", such as a production swap-hook payload source or local hook-harness source with a fork/local test id and hookData hash. Add a negative test proving non-empty hookData plus an empty or generic evidence array cannot emit evidenceTypes:["non-empty-swap-hook-data"].
findings.details: The catalog is meant to let future agents inspect coverage programmatically, but buildCreatorCoinCatalog currently promotes any spec labeled non-empty-approved when the pool fixture hookData is non-empty. evidenceTypesFor then emits non-empty-swap-hook-data without checking that the evidence proves a valid production payload or harness. That leaves the main policy boundary dependent on human discipline rather than the artifact contract.

findings.title: Residual non-empty swap-hook-data proof is closed in todos without a new active follow-up
findings.suggested_fix: Create a new pending, narrower todo for the residual valid production non-empty V4 swap hookData route or labeled local hook harness, or keep todo 007 pending until that follow-up exists and is linked.
findings.details: R14 and the success criteria require the residual non-empty proof to remain separately tracked if it is not proven. The only matching todo is now status: complete, and the remaining work is described only in completed todo prose and planning docs. Future agents that scan file-based todos will not see an active item for the unresolved proof target.

residual_risks: The new catalog, route artifacts, and gap matrix are discoverable JSON artifacts and include policy labels that agents can join through poolId and routeArtifactId.

The relevant docs/solutions learning was not missed: docs/solutions/workflow-issues/public-config-doppler-foundry-aliases-2026-05-12.md is cited in the plan and the README keeps fork validation behind Doppler without raw RPC values.
Catalog evidence references are still mostly human-readable strings; future automation may want structured source fields such as testName, command, block, and sourceArtifact.
testing_gaps: Ran bun run router:verify successfully: 17 Bun tests passed and generate:check reported no drift.
Ran forge test --match-path test/router/FameRouterGeneratedArtifacts.t.sol successfully: 5 Foundry artifact tests passed.
Did not run the Doppler-backed pinned Base fork suite in this reviewer pass, so live fork execution remains assumed from the existing workflow rather than reverified here.
